Brayan Londono

Tampa, FL • (813) 407-0629 • brayanlondono.pm@gmail.com • linkedin.com/in/brayan-londono

Former crisis psych admissions coordinator turned product builder. Three years as the first person patients saw during involuntary holds, active detox, and acute psychiatric episodes. Now I build healthcare and AI products. Co-founded Claire Health, a digital healthcare navigation platform that hooks into EDI transmissions to steer employees to lower-cost care. Co-founded Resume Tailor, shipped to 20K users and $48K ARR.

HEALTHCARE &amp; PRODUCT EXPERIENCE

Claire Health (www.getclairehealth.com)

Co-Founder (Project)

Built a real-time healthcare navigation platform for self-funded employers that reduces claims costs by steering employees to lower-cost, in-network care.

Platform monitors EDI 270/271 eligibility transmissions and 835/837 claims data to flag high-cost procedures in real time, then redirects care through the employer’s TPA or medical management team to lower-cost sites.

Built the pre-certification intercept workflow: Claire catches scheduled procedures before authorization completes and surfaces lower-cost alternatives via text to employees while they’re still deciding.

Ran a pilot with Meshoppen Stone (220 employees). $1K MRR.

Own product strategy, roadmap, and go-to-market. Work directly with engineering.

Resume Tailor06/2023 - Present

Co-Founder &amp; Product Manager

Built an AI job search product from zero to 20K users and $48K ARR. Own product, roadmap, and work directly with engineering.

Ran 50+ user interviews. Key insight: users weren’t avoiding the product because it didn’t work. They were avoiding job searching because rejection hurts. Repositioned the product around that.

Built recruiter outreach after noticing users churned once their resume was done. 25% of actives now use it weekly.

Trial conversion was leaking at 60%. Rebuilt the flow so users could act on insights in one click. Leak dropped to 35%.

Killed mock interviews after 6 weeks. 90% tried it once, almost nobody came back. Moved the team to features that actually retained.

Acadia Healthcare01/2017 - 02/2020

Admissions Coordinator

First point of contact for patients in psychiatric crisis, like involuntary holds, active detox, and acute behavioral episodes. Worked across inpatient psych, detox, and military units.

Coordinated between patients, families, nurses, and physicians to translate clinical complexity (symptoms, acuity, diagnoses) into fast care placement decisions.

Rebuilt the insurance verification workflow end to end. Admission wait times dropped from 3–4 hours to 45 minutes. Claim approval rates increased.

Managed the full intake process: benefits verification, clinical screening, bed assignment, and family communication across multiple payer types and plan structures.

VENTURE CAPITAL &amp; ADVISORY

TampaBay.Ventures10/2022 - 06/2023

Venture Capital Analyst

Sourced and executed a $5M allocation toward Betr’s $35M Series A-2 (Jake Paul’s sports betting company). Took the company’s deck, financials, data room and rebuilt them into an investor-ready package. Built the presentation, structured the data room, and pitched LPs directly.

Spotted onboarding friction at a portfolio company by mapping their user flow. Reduced churn 10% and made it into their Series A-2 deck.

EY06/2022 - 08/2022

Venture Analyst

Ran product validation for CoachConvo, an AI soft-skills training platform. Interviewed banking staff about their actual daily conversations: what was hard, what they avoided, what made them anxious.

Turned those interviews into training scenarios the sales team used with Bank of America. Second meeting conversion increased 40%.

Ballast Point Ventures05/2021 - 01/2022

Intern

Identified a gap in PBM cost transparency that no existing product addressed. Built a working prototype and pitched the investment team on the opportunity.

Supported deal sourcing, financial modeling, and founder outreach.

EDUCATION

BS in Econometrics &amp; Quantitative Economics

University of South Florida

SKILLS

Product: A/B Testing, Cross-Functional Leadership, Funnel Optimization, PRDs &amp; Specs, Product Roadmapping, Success Metrics Definition, Usability Testing, User Interviews, User Research

Healthcare: EDI 270/271 &amp; 835/837, Pre-Certification Workflows, Insurance Verification, Benefits Administration, TPA Coordination, Medical Management, Payer Operations

Tools: Figma, GA4, JIRA, JS, Node, OpenAI, Python, React, TS
